lastRunSummary: Built Game 51: Pinkerton Trail - stealth pursuit tailing, suspicion meter, 47 tests pass.

gameQueue.title: Frontier Forge
gameQueue.concept: Blacksmith crafting simulation. Heat a bar of iron to the right temperature, hammer it into shape with timed strikes (too hard = flatten wrong), then quench to lock the shape. Each weapon/tool requires a different strike pattern. First precision-crafting multi-phase mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First multi-phase sequential material transformation (heat -> strike -> quench), first pattern-memory + precision-timing hybrid, first material state simulation (iron color changes with temperature)

gameQueue.title: Dust Bowl Derby
gameQueue.concept: Top-down demolition derby in a frontier arena. RAM rivals off the dirt track before they ram you. Manage engine heat and body damage simultaneously. Rival AI uses bumper-target and avoidance behaviors. First vehicular combat / arena-survival mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First vehicular combat mechanic (offensive ramming vs. defensive racing), first arena-survival format with simultaneous dual-resource drain, first physics-impulse collision response used offensively

gameQueue.title: Smoke Signal
gameQueue.concept: Timed pattern communication puzzle. Create smoke signals by controlling fire intensity and a blanket-wave mechanic. Match signal patterns sent by a distant tribe before the wind changes direction. First timing-based visual communication mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First dual-input pattern generation (fire intensity + blanket timing), first environmental interference mechanic (wind direction scrambles pattern), first cross-distance communication framing

Built Game 46: Prairie Telegraph - semaphore relay chain, 26-letter visual alphabet, hex direct-selector UI, wind gusts, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 47: Outlaw Auction - hidden-value bounty bidding, 5 behavioral AI rivals, bankroll management, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 48: Hangman's Bluff - interrogation deception, lie memory, 3-stage sheriff checkpoint, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 49: Lariat Spin - rotational rope physics, momentum-accumulation + precision-release, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 50: Tin Pan Alley - melody-completion piano puzzle, musical phrase-memory mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 51: Pinkerton Trail - stealth pursuit tailing, suspicion meter, evidence collection, 47 tests pass.
